title: Shelving & Storage
heroAlt: Custom built-in shelving and storage joinery in Sydney
metaTitle: Custom Shelving & Storage Sydney | InsideOut Joinery & Renos
metaDescription: Custom built-in shelving, book walls, display storage and utility cabinetry across Sydney. Designed around the room dimensions and the way the space is used every day.
intro: Storage problems in Sydney homes are rarely about space — they are about shelving and cabinetry that was not planned for the room. Built-in shelving, book walls, display storage and utility cupboards that are properly sized and detailed make rooms feel less cluttered and more resolved. We design and build storage joinery around the actual room, not the closest modular size available.
includedTitle: Storage and shelving we regularly build
included: Built-in bookshelves and library-style display walls sized to ceiling height and wall length
Hallway and entry storage joinery that improves circulation and keeps high-traffic areas clear
Home office shelving, floating desks and study nooks built around compact or awkward wall spaces
Utility cupboards, linen storage and pantry cabinetry designed to close away neatly
Mixed open and closed shelving layouts that balance display, daily-access and concealed storage
Storage joinery that carries the same finish and detailing as the wider home fitout

featureBlocks.title: Shelving designed for the actual wall
featureBlocks.text: Off-the-shelf shelving rarely fits Sydney rooms cleanly. Built-in shelving can use the full ceiling height, awkward alcoves and wall lengths that modular products leave underused. When it is sized and detailed properly, it reads as part of the architecture rather than furniture that was placed there.

featureBlocks.title: Open, closed or a mix of both
featureBlocks.text: The most practical storage usually balances open display with concealed cabinetry. Open shelving keeps everyday items accessible and the room feeling lighter. Closed joinery hides the things that do not need to be on show. Getting the ratio right makes the room feel more deliberate.

featureBlocks.title: Storage that solves more than one problem
featureBlocks.text: Good storage joinery often solves layout problems at the same time — a hallway unit that creates a landing zone, a study nook that uses a dead corner, a display wall that anchors the living room. We think through both when planning the scope.

materialsTitle: Shelving and storage finishes clients ask for
materials: Painted polyurethane for cleaner built-in storage that sits quietly against walls and ceilings
Timber-look and warm laminate finishes for living areas, studies and hallways where texture matters
Open shelf sections with concealed cabinetry below for mixed display and utility storage
Integrated desk surfaces, pull-out drawers and internal fittings tailored to how the storage is used

beforeAfter.title: Before & after
beforeAfter.text: The Darlinghurst project included custom storage joinery alongside the Murphy bed fitout — showing how a multi-use room can be fully resolved with the right shelving, cabinetry and layout decisions made together.
beforeAfter.beforeAlt: Darlinghurst room before custom shelving and storage joinery
beforeAfter.afterAlt: Darlinghurst room after custom storage joinery and built-in shelving installation

faqs.question: Can shelving be built floor to ceiling?
faqs.answer: Yes. Floor-to-ceiling built-ins are one of the most effective ways to use wall space in Sydney homes — particularly in rooms with good ceiling height.

faqs.question: Can you build storage into alcoves and awkward corners?
faqs.answer: Yes. Alcoves, angled walls and odd wall lengths are exactly where custom shelving adds value that modular systems cannot match.

faqs.question: Can shelving be part of a home office or study nook?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Study nooks, floating desks and shelving systems can all be designed together as a compact, functional work zone.

faqs.question: Can storage joinery match the kitchen or wardrobe finish?
faqs.answer: Yes. When shelving and storage are part of a broader fitout, we carry the same finish, profile and hardware direction across the project so the result feels cohesive.

faqs.question: Do you build utility and pantry storage as well as display shelving?
faqs.answer: Yes. Pantry cabinetry, linen cupboards and utility storage are a regular part of what we build — often alongside a kitchen or laundry scope.

ctaTitle: Need storage that fits the room properly?
ctaText: Send through photos of the space, the wall dimensions or a rough brief and we can help plan a shelving or storage scope that makes the room work harder.
